title: Performance Manager (f/m/d)
description:
Driving performance. Creating transparency. Delivering results.




Take ownership of our performance landscape across international transport operations. You will monitor delivery performance end-to-end, identify improvement opportunities and work closely with stakeholders to drive measurable impact.




Join our team of 11 people and play a key role in optimizing KPIs, improving lead times and ensuring operational excellence across borders.




We value flexibility: you’ll work around 40% on site in Bad Hersfeld, up to 50% from home, and around 10% travelling across Europe.




Your Role:

Own and drive improvments to lead times and on time delivery performance across first, middle and final mile
Define and manage KPI targets, ensuring they are ambitious, measurable and aligned with business goals
Monitor performance, analyze data and identify root causes to implement sustainable improvements
Participate in weekly and monthly performance reviews, tracking progress and driving accountability
Manage operational disruptions (e.g. weather, strikes, backlogs) and coordinate recovery actions
Develop new KPIs, automate reporting and build performance dashboards (e.g. Power BI)




Your Profile:

Degree in business, management, logistics or a related field
5–7 years of experience in performance management, operations or analytics
Strong analytical skills with a data-driven mindset and focus on continuous improvement
Proven ability to take ownership, drive results and work in a fast-paced environment
Experience with data analysis tools and performance reporting systems
Fluent English (C1 level), written and spoken




What do we bring to the table?

Continuing education: Take off with us. We promote your personal and professional development in our in-house Academy.
Great team: An open corporate culture is important to us. That's why a dedicated team is waiting for you, one that will welcome you warmly and be ready to help you.
Company pension scheme: To ensure that you are also well protected in your retirement, we subsidize your pension plan.
Employee discounts via corporate benefits: You get versatile employee discounts at various online portals.
Safety: A future-proof industry that is characterized by growth.
Attractive working environment: You can expect an attractive working environment close to top management with room for your own ideas, flat hierarchies and short decision-making paths.




Interested?

Then take the first step directly and apply preferably via the apply button. Benefit from our diverse career opportunities. We look forward to meeting you and are well prepared!

Questions?

Please contact Lea Bührer at 06677 646-55347.
